news.summary: Veteran of the gaming industry, John Smedley, is venturing into the world of Web3 gaming with a brand-new AAA shooter. This upcoming game will showcase the innovative Tezos layer-2 blockchain technology known as Etherlink. Smedley's entry into this space marks his initial venture in Web3 gaming, hinting at exciting developments in the industry. Stay tuned for more updates on this groundbreaking project.
news.headline: Game industry veteran John Smedley secures $30.5M for debut shooter on Tezos-powered Etherlink blockchain.

news.summary: The Bitcoin price remaining below $112,000 for an extended period is attributed to the lack of new buyers and the presence of FOMO-induced greed. These factors are anticipated to have a significant influence, potentially prolonging the stagnation of Bitcoin values.
news.headline: Bitcoin struggles to surpass $112,000 ATH due to lack of new buyers and FOMO-driven greed, analysts suggest.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on July 3, 2025, a national hotel brokerage and advisory firm known as DSH Hotel Advisors revealed key information. Specializing in hotel investment sales, the firm is based in Tampa and is headed by Dennis S. Hopper, who serves as the Managing Principal and Founder. Additionally, announcements were made regarding Sam Subodh Patel's involvement in the firm.
news.headline: Hotel brokerage DSH Hotel Advisors closes sale of Jacksonville Candlewood Suites in heated market.头9M四2935Dennis S. Hopper is firm's Managing Principal/Founder.

news.summary: A luxury RV park in Caddo Mills, Texas, named Holiday Road RV Park, is inviting travelers and long-term residents to experience their premier community. The park, managed by Lamplight Luxury RV Parks, boasts modern amenities, security features, and comfort for guests. Located in Caddo Mills, TX, the park offers a unique blend of services to ensure a pleasant experience for those staying short or long-term.
news.headline: Lamplight Luxury RV Parks promoting Holiday Road RV Park in Caddo Mills, TX to travelers for an ideal getaway.

news.summary: A new AI-powered software is enhancing ABA practices by improving patient relationships and optimizing workflows with advanced tools. Wilma™, the leading AI practice management software, is revolutionizing the industry in Diablo, California. Launched on July 3, 2025, this software is helping practitioners become more efficient and effective. This advancement comes as the nation marks its independence, with many celebrations lighting up the sky. Wilma™ is playing a pivotal role in transforming how ABA practices operate, making a significant impact in the industry.
news.headline: AI software Wilma™ revolutionizes ABA practices, enhancing patient relationships and workflow efficiency. Supported by PRNewswire on July 3, 2025.

news.summary: Next week, the famous pygmy hippo named Moo Deng will be celebrating her first birthday. Interestingly, a group of cryptocurrency enthusiasts are currently boosting the value of an unofficial meme coin associated with her on the Solana blockchain.
news.headline: Pygmy hippo Moo Deng's birthday plans revealed by zoo as her unofficial Solana meme coin surges due to crypto degens.

news.summary: Unemployment is projected to reach the highest level since October 2021. The latest jobs report indicates strong hiring trends, leading to a decrease in unemployment. S&P 500 futures are on the rise following this positive development in the job market.
news.headline: Job report shows strong hiring, lower unemployment; S&P 500 futures increase. Jobless rate expected highest since October 2021.

news.summary: Torrance, CA - On July 3, 2025, Navitas Semiconductor, a renowned power semiconductor company specializing in gallium nitride (GaN) power ICs and silicon carbide (SiC) technology, disclosed its involvement in several forthcoming investor events.
news.headline: Navitas Semiconductor to attend CJS Securities Conference; industry leader in next-gen power semiconductors.

news.summary: In JILIN, China on July 3, 2025, Zhengye Biotechnology Holding Limited, listed on Nasdaq as ZYBT, is a prominent veterinary vaccine manufacturer engaged in the comprehensive process of researching, developing, producing, and selling veterinary vaccines. The company specializes in livestock vaccines.
news.headline: China-based Zhengye Biotechnology Holding Limited (Nasdaq: ZYBT) disclosed fiscal year 2024 financial results on July 3, 2025.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Hims to reach out to him for a consultation. If you bought or obtained securities in Hims within the period of April 29, 2025, and June 22, 2025, and wish to explore your options, contact James Wilson directly.
news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for investors of Hims & Hers Health. Losses in Hims between April 29 - June 22, 2025 can contact James (Josh) Wilson for options.

news.summary: In Caesarea, Israel, on July 3, 2025, IceCure Medical Ltd. (Nasdaq: ICCM) revealed their development of minimally-invasive cryoablation technology. This innovative method freezes tumors as an alternative to surgical removal. IceCure is at the forefront of this technology, offering a promising solution for patients worldwide.
news.headline: IceCure Medical Ltd. (Nasdaq: ICCM) reports preliminary financial results for the Three and Six Months Ended June 30, 2025.

news.summary: John Smedley has confidence that his latest studio's bold shooter game, Reaper Actual, will captivate the gaming community with its innovative utilization of blockchain technology. He believes it epitomizes the correct implementation of Web3.
news.headline: Creator of EverQuest and Planetside announces open-world shooter 'Reaper Actual', set to revolutionize gaming with blockchain technology.

news.summary: SYNEVIT® introduces an optimized inositol complex formulated with a synergistic combination of ingredients to enhance support for women's natural reproductive system. The product launch was announced in Fort Lauderdale, Florida on July 3, 2025. Polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) is a prevalent reproductive system issue gaining increased awareness annually.
news.headline: PCOS common issue for women in reproductive health. FERTILIMIN® aids with SYNEVIT®'s optimized inositol complex.

news.summary: Judy Goldring, previously the President and Head of Global Distribution at AGF, has been appointed as the new CEO of the company with immediate effect. This announcement signifies a significant change in leadership at AGF, a prominent firm in the financial sector. Goldring's transition to this role reflects a strategic decision by AGF's management to entrust her with greater responsibilities. As the newly appointed CEO, Goldring will oversee the company's operations and lead its global distribution initiatives. This move underscores AGF's commitment to innovating and adapting to the evolving needs of the market under Goldring's direction.
news.headline: AGF CEO Kevin McCreadie passes away, Judy Goldring appointed CEO. Goldring to take over as CEO immediately.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, Nano Labs Ltd (Nasdaq: NA), a key player in Web 3.0 solutions in China, disclosed the acquisition of 74,315 Binance Coin (BNB) tokens via OTC at an average price of roughly US$672.45, totaling around US$50 million. This purchase brings the Company's total reserve of leading digital currencies, such as Bitcoin and BNB, to about US$160 million. This move signals the initial phase of Nano Labs' strategic plan to boost BNB holdings as part of its commitment to growing its digital assets portfolio.
news.headline: Nano Labs buys $50 million worth of Binance Coin (BNB), expanding digital asset reserves to $160 million. Successful step in BNB strategic plan.

news.summary: In Geneva, Switzerland, an announcement was made regarding the revenue guidance for fiscal year 2025, ranging between $16.0 million to $20.0 million. This indicates a substantial annual growth rate of 45% to 82%.
news.headline: SEALSQ Corp predicts FY 2025 revenue of $16-20M, showing a 45%-82% increase from the previous year, focusing on post-quantum security solutions deployment.

news.summary: On July 2, 2025, PetMed Express, Inc. ("PetMeds ®") (NASDAQ: PETS) of Delray Beach, Florida, received a notice from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC stating that the company is not in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1). This is due to the non-timely filing of its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2025. The requirement for timely filing of all necessary periodic financial reports with the Securities and Exchange Commission was specified in the notice.
news.headline: PetMed Express notified by Nasdaq for delayed filing of Annual Report on Form 10-K, not in compliance with Listing Rule 5250(c)(1).

news.summary: Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE: DAL) is gearing up to release its second-quarter earnings on July 10 amidst a challenging period. Analysts predict earnings of $2.03 per share for the quarter, a decrease from $2.36 per share last year. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $16.18 billion, down from $16.66 billion the previous year. Delta Air Lines, along with Korean Air, announced a joint investment of $550 million in WestJet, a Canadian carrier, on May 9. This move has garnered attention from investors looking to capitalize on dividends. The latest developments concerning Delta Air Lines can be found on financial news platforms.
news.headline: Investors eyeing $500 monthly gains from Delta Air Lines stock with Q2 earnings at $2.03 per share and $16.18 billion revenue.

news.summary: A non-profit dog rescue organization in Orange County, California, known as The Little Red Dog, recently unveiled its upcoming July fundraiser aimed at tackling rising euthanasia rates and declining donations. The initiative is primarily driven by social media and is crucial in light of the current situation. The organization is urgently seeking support to address this pressing issue.
news.headline: The Little Red Dog launches July fundraiser to combat rising euthanasia rates and dwindling donations in Orange County.

news.summary: Investors who incurred losses in Organon are urged by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson to contact him directly to explore their options. If you bought or obtained securities in Organon within the period from October 31, 2024, to April 30, 2025, and wish to discuss your situation, please reach out.
news.headline: Investors in Organon between Oct 31, 2024 & Apr 30, 2025 urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi LLP for potential claims.

news.summary: Pickering Interfaces, the top provider of modular signal switching and simulation solutions for electronic test and verification, has revealed the enhancement of its 41-670 (PXI) and 43-670 (PXIe) LVDT, RVDT, and resolver simulator modules. These modules now support high-speed resolver simulation up to 130kRPM rotation. This development caters to the increasing demand for accurate testing of advanced servo systems in crucial sectors like automotive and aerospace.
news.headline: Pickering Interfaces launches high-speed PXI resolver simulation modules for aerospace and automotive applications with speeds up to 130kRPM.
China Plans To Speed Up Approvals For Advanced Medical Devices

news.summary: In Carlsbad, California, Thermo Fisher Scientific has shared that the US FDA has given the green light to the Oncomine™ Dx Express Test on the Ion Torrent™ Genexus™ Dx Integrated Sequencer. This approval allows the test to be utilized as an in vitro diagnostic (IVD) assay and as a companion diagnostic (CDx) for Dizal’s ZEGFROVY® (sunvozertinib) and in tumor profiling. With this development, rapid next-generation sequencing (NGS) is now a step closer to being available in decentralized clinical settings.
news.headline: FDA approves Thermo Fisher's NGS assay for ZEGFROVY companion diagnostic and tumor profiling, bringing rapid sequencing to clinical settings.

news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on July 3, 2025, Vitrolife AB (publ) announced that its Q2 2025 interim report is scheduled for release on Thursday, July 17, 2025, at 8:00 am CEST. A conference call for investors, analysts, and financial media is set for 10:00 am CEST on the same day, where the company's performance will be reviewed.
news.headline: Vitrolife Group to present Q2 2025 interim report on July 17, 2025, at 08:00 am CEST, with a conference call at 10:00 am CEST.
